articles.title: UK dual-citizens report residency difficulties in France
articles.summary: Some British citizens holding dual nationality say they are experiencing administrative challenges when renewing residency documents in France following post-Brexit regulatory changes. Authorities say clarification of documentation requirements is ongoing.

articles.title: France municipal election campaigns reach final stage
articles.summary: Candidates across France conclude campaigning ahead of upcoming municipal elections, with major parties competing for control of city councils in Paris, Marseille and Lyon.

articles.title: United States presidential campaign intensifies nationwide
articles.summary: Political campaigns across the United States continue to expand rallies and policy discussions as candidates prepare for upcoming primary contests.

articles.title: European markets cautious amid inflation concerns
articles.summary: Investors across Europe are closely monitoring inflation indicators and central bank policy signals as financial markets open cautiously.

articles.title: India expands technology manufacturing strategy
articles.summary: India continues to strengthen semiconductor and digital manufacturing initiatives aimed at positioning the country as a global technology production hub.

articles.title: Nigeria infrastructure programme targets regional growth
articles.summary: Nigeria's government has announced expanded infrastructure investment focusing on transportation corridors and energy projects designed to support regional trade.

articles.title: Artificial intelligence investment accelerates worldwide
articles.summary: Technology companies across North America, Europe and Asia are increasing investment in artificial intelligence development and research infrastructure.

articles.title: International football leagues approach decisive fixtures
articles.summary: Major European football competitions approach decisive matches as clubs compete for league titles and qualification for international tournaments.
